name: BB:Threats: HTTP Service Unavailable
notes: This Building Block detects when the web server service is unavailable.
bb_references: BB:Threats: HTTP Service Unavailable on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Malformed Server Request
when the event matches "Response Code" = 503 AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: HTTP Service Unavailable on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Malformed Server Request
AND when the event matches "Response Code" = 503 AQL filter query
